KKT_obstruction: If the contact lemma fails, then there exists theta, lambda, nu with F=0, sum theta=0, v·theta>=0, dF>0, nu>=0, nu(v·theta)=0, and H v=lambda g+nu v.
boundary_reduction: If v·theta=0, then H v=lambda g+nu v with nu>=0.
interior_reduction: If v·theta>0, then nu=0 and H v=lambda g.
name: Multilevel KKT obstruction system for the weighted-asymmetry contact lemma
remaining_exact_certificate: Prove the KKT obstruction system has no solution with dF>0 for w=12,16, e.g. by a Terwilliger block-SOS or exact interval/Krawtchouk certificate.
why_this_generalizes_pair_stabilized: The pair-stabilized proof closes the fixed-rest symmetric slice. This KKT system is for arbitrary multilevel theta and does not assume the other 22 coordinates are equal.
